title: Bulbophyllum abbreviatum
taxonomy: Bulbophyllum abbreviatum is a species of orchid in the genus Bulbophyllum. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is further classified into the subfamily Epidendroideae and tribe Dendrobieae. Bulbophyllum abbreviatum is native to Southeast Asia and is known to thrive in tropical regions. The species is characterized by its small, white flowers and compact growth habit.
